description: A cheerful beaver/otter mobile AI companion holding a laptop, designed to make app work visible inside DevinX.

visualIdentity.body: warm tan rounded beaver/otter body with a white muzzle and thick black outline
visualIdentity.face: simple black oval eyes with white highlights, rounded black nose, and cheerful whisker marks
visualIdentity.prop: silver laptop held, carried, or opened on Devin's lap
visualIdentity.tail: flat brown beaver-style tail with subtle crosshatch texture
visualIdentity.style: Codex-compatible pixel-adjacent mascot sprite, readable at small mobile sizes

notes: This package contains a real animated 8x9 Codex-style sprite atlas.
For DevinX, use this as an in-app companion asset rather than a macOS-style system overlay.
The current rows include seated laptop typing, laptop walk cycles, wave, bounce, failed, waiting, and review behavior.
